title: chamaecrista procumbens
intro: Chamaecrista procumbens, also known as sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial herb native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Chamaecrista procumbens include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
